dct_title_s: United States, west coast, California : harbors of Santa Barbara islands
dct_description_sm: Relief shown by hachures and spot heights; depths shown by soundings and isolines.
Includes view, tides table, and notes.

Anacapa Island and east end of Santa Cruz Island -- Prisoner's Harbor, Santa Cruz Island -- South East Anchorage, San Clemente Island -- Cuyler Harbor, San Miguel Island -- North West Harbor, San Clemente Island.
